publication-branch.title: Publication branch name
publication-branch.tooltip: The publication Git branch, which will contain the generated documentation in the Git repository.

export-format-tooltip.intro: The format in which will be the models exported to Git. The diff editor also shows the models in this format.
export-format-tooltip.json: - JSON is well-tested and the default for the rest of Dataspecer. Therefore, it is recommended.
export-format-tooltip.yaml: - YAML may be slightly more friendly for diff/text viewing experience. However, the implementation is experimental with no guarantee of being bug-free.
export-format-tooltip.note: (From a software perspective we are still working with JSON within Dataspecer, this format only affects the Git export and the diff editor)

export-version-tooltip.old: - The old version maps packages to directories and the models are put as files within the specific package.
export-version-tooltip.new: - The new version is more structured. It still holds true that models are files, which are inside directories that map to packages.
export-version-tooltip.structure: - The structure comes from the fact the models are put to a directory based on a type of the model.
export-version-tooltip.example: - For example, packages are inside "directories" directory, and visual models are in "visual-models" directory.
